home.subtitle: RPG, adventure and open worlds with their own identity. Handcrafted, with the soul of older games and today's technology.

featured.title: Vetus Rex — The Origin
featured.description: Open-world RPG · dark fantasy. It has its own site: we introduce it and take you there.

about.title: Who we are
about.lead: Tiki-Tiki Studios was born from the idea of making the games we wanted to play: open worlds with soul, stories that matter and a style of our own. We're showing up at EVA Argentina to share what we're working on.

values.title: Stories that matter
values.text: Narrative you care about, not filler between quests.

values.title: Open worlds
values.text: Places to explore at your own pace, full of secrets.

values.title: Handcrafted
values.text: Artisanal identity, from the logo to the last icon.
